title: carex cespitosa subsp. wiluica
intro: Carex cespitosa subsp. wiluica, also known as the tufted sedge, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex cespitosa subsp. wiluica include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
